calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-04-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Greg Humphrey, Plaintiff/Respondent in pro per; Carmel Gouveia, Defendant/Appellant in pro per; Christine Nevarez, Defendant/Appellant in pro per.

The oath is administered to all parties and prospective witnesses. The parties stipulate to the matter proceeding before Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles.

Greg Humphrey testifies on his own behalf. During his testimony the following documentary evidence is submitted: Respondent's Group 1. Mr. Humphrey is cross-examined by Ms. Gouveia.

Carmel Gouveia testifies in her own behalf. During her testimony the following documentary evidence is submitted: Appellant's Group 1.

The cause is submitted for decision.

Judge Pro Tem: Elliott Myles. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. (Not reported)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-08-2017 Judgment Entered

Off Calendar Jun-08-2017 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
